   501→
   502→const BACK_BODY = [
   503→  "M338.09,617.53c-5.38,37.37-2.34,46.75-13.43,92.56-10.14,41.91-21.92,67.81-28.49,122.02-6.57,54.21-25.82,43.45-26.29,67.21,13.66,111.93,7.04,93.71-4.26,125.43-11.3,31.72-21.86,73.13-24.15,91.15-2.43,19.1,1.56,17.67-.48,27.37-2.04,9.69-1.79,24.17-.68,32.96,1.11,8.8.31,25.55-21.55,25.55s-31.31-13.28-31.31-13.28c-9.26-2.69-19.27-5.92-25.75-7-16.86-4.49-5.26-14.18-5.26-14.18,4.27-5.71,10.51-5.16,10.51-5.16,3.83-5,8.27-4.53,8.27-4.53,9.45-5.74,20-19.82,20-19.82,1.68-8.98,3.37-15.78,4.49-27.75,1.12-11.97-4.49-56.05-10.67-121.07-6.18-65.02,17.83-88.61,18.44-118.17.61-29.56,7.68-47.76,4.65-61.4-24.43-90.25,1.74-211.05,10.04-234.47,8.3-23.43.48-15.64,6.03-37.78,5.55-22.14,9.61-65.59,9.4-79.04-.21-13.45,1.07-43.45-11.96-63.52-13.03-20.07-21.38-58.05-21.38-58.05-8.01,12.22-29.64,45.31-38.21,53.82-8.57,8.51-11.36,12.25-28.5,35.09-17.14,22.84-28.07,51.28-51.22,74.12-47.58,47.34-39.57,58.32-39.57,58.32,12.72,15.33,4.44,22.35,6.06,31.95,4.14,19.2,3.25,23.64,3.25,23.64-16.86,11.32-15.97-20.35-15.97-20.35-16.27,12.75-14.94,4.01-16.4,11.7-1.59,15.73-6.53,18.3-4.06,21.2,2.47,2.91,6,10.09,6,10.09,10.06,9.06,1.59,15.9,1.59,15.9-8.47-9.58-17.83-10.77-19.42-20.18-1.59-9.4-6.04-21.03-6.04-29.16,1.11-10.56,11.63-35.51,11.69-44.84-.63-23.11,3.58-21.6,5.85-26.81,2.26-5.21,13.01-41.09,27.43-77.53,14.42-36.44,39.96-62.06,49.46-70.63,9.51-8.57,7.52-17.56,11.94-25.06,4.42-7.5,10.91-21.32,10.91-21.32,8.04-27.27,30.83-46.43,30.83-46.43,12.4-75.97,79.27-81.1,79.27-81.1",
   504→  "M338.09,617.53c5.38,37.37,2.34,46.75,13.43,92.56,10.14,41.91,21.92,67.81,28.49,122.02,6.57,54.21,25.82,43.45,26.29,67.21-13.66,111.93-7.04,93.71,4.26,125.43,11.3,31.72,21.86,73.13,24.15,91.15,2.43,19.1-1.56,17.67.48,27.37,2.04,9.69,1.79,24.17.68,32.96-1.11,8.8-.31,25.55,21.55,25.55s31.31-13.28,31.31-13.28c9.26-2.69,19.27-5.92,25.75-7,16.86-4.49,5.26-14.18,5.26-14.18-4.27-5.71-10.51-5.16-10.51-5.16-3.83-5-8.27-4.53-8.27-4.53-9.45-5.74-20-19.82-20-19.82-1.68-8.98-3.37-15.78-4.49-27.75-1.12-11.97,4.49-56.05,10.67-121.07,6.18-65.02-17.83-88.61-18.44-118.17-.61-29.56-7.68-47.76-4.65-61.4,24.43-90.25-1.74-211.05-10.04-234.47-8.3-23.43-.48-15.64-6.03-37.78-5.55-22.14-9.61-65.59-9.4-79.04.21-13.45-1.07-43.45,11.96-63.52,13.03-20.07,21.38-58.05,21.38-58.05,8.01,12.22,29.64,45.31,38.21,53.82,8.57,8.51,11.36,12.25,28.5,35.09,17.14,22.84,28.07,51.28,51.22,74.12,47.58,47.34,39.57,58.32,39.57,58.32-12.72,15.33-4.44,22.35-6.06,31.95-4.14,19.2-3.25,23.64-3.25,23.64,16.86,11.32,15.97-20.35,15.97-20.35,16.27,12.75,14.94,4.01,16.4,11.7,1.59,15.73,6.53,18.3,4.06,21.2-2.47,2.91-6,10.09-6,10.09-10.06,9.06-1.59,15.9-1.59,15.9,8.47-9.58,17.83-10.77,19.42-20.18,1.59-9.4,6.04-21.03,6.04-29.16-1.11-10.56-11.63-35.51-11.69-44.84.63-23.11-3.58-21.6-5.85-26.81-2.26-5.21-13.01-41.09-27.43-77.53-14.42-36.44-39.96-62.06-49.46-70.63-9.51-8.57-7.52-17.56-11.94-25.06-4.42-7.5-10.91-21.32-10.91-21.32-8.04-27.27-30.83-46.43-30.83-46.43-12.4-75.97-79.27-81.1-79.27-81.1",
   505→  "M283.93,83.8c-3.09.99-6.5,4.5-5.66,15.44,1.49,19.17,6.83,22.48,14.26,21.04,0,0,.59,9.81,3.56,15.57l.35,26.59s-.29,5.27-1.02,12.91c0,0-9.49,9.06-14.75,11.6-5.26,2.55-26.14,10.75-31.26,13.02-5.11,2.26-13.44,7.73-15.04,8.44",
   506→  "M390.62,83.8c3.08,1,6.49,4.51,5.65,15.44-1.49,19.17-6.84,22.48-14.26,21.04,0,0-.59,9.81-3.57,15.57l1.29,26.59s.29,5.27,1.02,12.91c0,0,9.49,9.06,14.75,11.6s26.14,10.75,31.26,13.02c5.11,2.26,13.44,7.73,15.04,8.44",
   507→  "M337.28,131.31c16.08,0,25.6,12.03,30.04,9.51,4.43-2.51,8.22-13.01,16.73-23.77,8.5-10.76-.37-12.56,9.25-42.7,9.61-30.14-14.79-56.46-21.08-60.41-6.29-3.95,17.74,10.04,4.81-3.23-12.94-13.27-39.19-4.3-47.32-2.15s27.72-9.69,0-6.1c-22.53,2.92-40.67,14.6-47.67,34.66",
   508→  "M337.28,131.31c-16.09,0-25.61,12.03-30.04,9.51-4.44-2.51-8.23-13.01-16.73-23.77-8.5-10.76.37-12.56-9.24-42.7-1.51-4.74-2.18-17.9-2.22-22.01v-.04c-.04-5.66,1.13-10.73,2.98-15.18",
   509→  "M30.42,643.57s8.51-5.17,2.94-13.1c-4.65-6.6-5.41-6.16-2.94-15.33,1.91-7.11.72-12.42,3.44-17.55",
   510→  "M645.76,643.57s-8.51-5.17-2.94-13.1c4.65-6.6,5.41-6.16,2.94-15.33-1.91-7.11-.72-12.42-3.44-17.55",
   511→  "M399.82,188.91c-22.44-5.93-46.46-4.02-56.67-3.6-3.38.14-6.74.14-10.13,0-10.22-.42-34.23-2.33-56.67,3.6",
   512→];
   513→
   514→/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   515→   COMPONENT SUPPORT UTILS
   516→   ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
   517→const getHeatmapColor = (intensity: number | undefined, baseColor: string) => {
   518→  if (!intensity || intensity === 0) return baseColor;
   519→  if (intensity > 0.7) return "#ef4444"; // Red (High fatigue)
   520→  if (intensity > 0.4) return "#f97316"; // Orange (Moderate)
   521→  return "#eab308"; // Yellow (Low)
   522→};
   523→
   524→interface Props {
   525→  onMuscleSelect?: (id: string, selectedIds: string[]) => void;
   526→  heatmapIntensity?: Record<string, number>;
   527→  highlightedMuscles?: string[];
   528→  secondaryHighlightedMuscles?: string[];
   529→  readOnly?: boolean;
   530→}
   531→
   532→function AnatomyMapComponent({
   533→  onMuscleSelect,
   534→  heatmapIntensity,
   535→  highlightedMuscles,
   536→  secondaryHighlightedMuscles,
   537→  readOnly,
   538→}: Props) {
   539→  // If we have highlighted muscles, check if any of them are ONLY in the BACK list to set the default view
   540→  const initialView = useMemo(() => {
   541→    const allHighlights = [...(highlightedMuscles || []), ...(secondaryHighlightedMuscles || [])];
   542→    if (allHighlights.length === 0) return "front";
   543→    const frontIds = new Set(FRONT.map((m) => m.id));
   544→    const backIds = new Set(BACK.map((m) => m.id));
   545→
   546→    // Check if any highlighted muscle is in FRONT
   547→    const hasFront = allHighlights.some((id) => frontIds.has(id));
   548→    const hasBack = allHighlights.some((id) => backIds.has(id));
   549→
   550→    // Default to back ONLY if no front muscles are highlighted but back ones are
   551→    if (!hasFront && hasBack) return "back";
   552→    return "front";
   553→  }, [highlightedMuscles, secondaryHighlightedMuscles]);
   554→
   555→  const [view, setView] = useState<"front" | "back">(initialView);
   556→  const [hovered, setHovered] = useState<string | null>(null);
   557→  const [activeTip, setActiveTip] = useState<string | null>(null);
   558→  const [selected, setSelected] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
   559→  const mapRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
   560→  const isInView = useInView(mapRef, { amount: 0.1 });
   561→  const prefersReducedMotion = useReducedMotion();
   562→
   563→  const muscles = view === "front" ? FRONT : BACK;
   564→  const bodyPaths = view === "front" ? FRONT_BODY : BACK_BODY;
   565→  const vb = "0 0 676.49 1203.49";
   566→
   567→  const bodyOutlineElement = useMemo(
   568→    () => (
   569→      <g opacity=".4">
   570→        {bodyPaths.map((d, i) => (
   571→          <path
   572→            key={i}
   573→            d={d}
   574→            fill="none"
   575→            stroke="rgba(72,74,104,0.5)"
   576→            strokeWidth="3.49"
   577→            strokeLinecap="round"
   578→            strokeLinejoin="round"
   579→          />
   580→        ))}
   581→      </g>
   582→    ),
   583→    [bodyPaths]
   584→  );
   585→
   586→  const toggle = useCallback(
   587→    (id: string) => {
   588→      if (readOnly) return;
   589→      setActiveTip(id);
   590→      setSelected((p) => {
   591→        const n = new Set(p);
   592→        if (n.has(id)) {
   593→          n.delete(id);
   594→        } else {
   595→          n.add(id);
   596→        }
   597→        setTimeout(() => onMuscleSelect?.(id, Array.from(n)), 0);
   598→        return n;
   599→      });
   600→    },
   601→    [onMuscleSelect, readOnly]
   602→  );
   603→
   604→  const tip = useMemo(
   605→    () =>
   606→      hovered || activeTip ? (muscles.find((m) => m.id === (hovered || activeTip)) ?? null) : null,
   607→    [hovered, activeTip, muscles]
   608→  );
   609→
   610→  const isMuscleActive = (id: string) => {
   611→    if (highlightedMuscles && highlightedMuscles.includes(id)) return true;
   612→    return selected.has(id);
   613→  };
   614→
   615→  const isMuscleSecondary = (id: string): boolean => {
   616→    return !!(
   617→      secondaryHighlightedMuscles &&
   618→      secondaryHighlightedMuscles.includes(id) &&
   619→      !isMuscleActive(id)
   620→    );
   621→  };
   622→
   623→  const muscleGroups = useMemo(() => {
   624→    return muscles.map((m) => {
   625→      const isActive = isMuscleActive(m.id);
   626→      const isSecondary = isMuscleSecondary(m.id);
   627→      const isHovered = hovered === m.id;
   628→      const isActiveTip = activeTip === m.id;
   629→      const activeOrSec = isActive || isHovered || isActiveTip || isSecondary;
   630→      const a = isActive || isHovered || isActiveTip;
   631→
   632→      let fillOpacity = 0.45;
   633→      if (isHovered || isActiveTip) fillOpacity = 0.9;
   634→      else if (isActive) fillOpacity = 0.75;
   635→      else if (isSecondary) fillOpacity = 0.3;
   636→
   637→      return (
   638→        <g
   639→          key={m.id}
   640→          className="cursor-pointer"
   641→          onMouseEnter={() => setHovered(m.id)}
   642→          onMouseLeave={() => setHovered(null)}
   643→          onClick={() => toggle(m.id)}
   644→          filter={activeOrSec && !prefersReducedMotion && isInView ? "url(#ng)" : undefined}
   645→          role="button"
   646→          tabIndex={0}
   647→          aria-label={m.name}
   648→          aria-pressed={isActive}
   649→          onKeyDown={(e) => {
   650→            if (e.key === "Enter" || e.key === " ") {
   651→              e.preventDefault();
   652→              toggle(m.id);
   653→            }
   654→          }}
   655→        >
   656→          {m.paths.map((d, i) => (
   657→            <path
   658→              key={i}
   659→              d={d}
   660→              fill={
   661→                activeOrSec
   662→                  ? m.color
   663→                  : getHeatmapColor(heatmapIntensity?.[m.id], "rgba(72,74,104,0.3)")
   664→              }
   665→              fillOpacity={fillOpacity}
   666→              stroke={activeOrSec ? m.color : "rgba(100,116,139,0.5)"}
   667→              strokeWidth={a ? 2 : isSecondary ? 1 : 1}
   668→              strokeLinejoin="round"
   669→              style={{ transition: "all .3s ease" }}
   670→            />
   671→          ))}
   672→        </g>
   673→      );
   674→    });
   675→  }, [
   676→    muscles,
   677→    selected,
   678→    highlightedMuscles,
   679→    secondaryHighlightedMuscles,
   680→    hovered,
   681→    activeTip,
   682→    heatmapIntensity,
   683→    prefersReducedMotion,
   684→    isInView,
   685→    toggle,
   686→  ]);
   687→
   688→  const muscleButtons = useMemo(() => {
   689→    return muscles.map((m) => {
   690→      const isActive = isMuscleActive(m.id);
   691→      const isSecondary = isMuscleSecondary(m.id);
   692→      const isHovered = hovered === m.id;
   693→      const isActiveTip = activeTip === m.id;
   694→      const a = isActive || isHovered || isActiveTip;
   695→      const activeOrSec = a || isSecondary;
   696→
   697→      return (
   698→        <button
   699→          key={m.id}
   700→          onClick={() => toggle(m.id)}
   701→          onMouseEnter={() => setHovered(m.id)}
   702→          onMouseLeave={() => setHovered(null)}
   703→          className={`flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold transition-all duration-200 border ${
   704→            a
   705→              ? "text-text-primary scale-105"
   706→              : isSecondary
   707→                ? "text-text-secondary scale-100"
   708→                : "text-text-secondary border-border hover:text-text-secondary bg-bg-surface/40"
   709→          }`}
   710→          style={
   711→            activeOrSec
   712→              ? {
   713→                  borderColor: `${m.color}${isSecondary ? "30" : "50"}`,
   714→                  backgroundColor: `${m.color}${isSecondary ? "08" : "15"}`,
   715→                  boxShadow:
   716→                    a && !prefersReducedMotion && isInView ? `0 0 14px ${m.glow}` : undefined,
   717→                }
   718→              : undefined
   719→          }
   720→        >
   721→          <span
   722→            className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full"
   723→            style={{
   724→              backgroundColor: isSecondary && !a ? `${m.color}80` : m.color,
   725→              boxShadow: a && !prefersReducedMotion && isInView ? `0 0 6px ${m.glow}` : undefined,
   726→            }}
   727→          />
   728→          {m.name}
   729→        </button>
   730→      );
   731→    });
   732→  }, [
   733→    muscles,
   734→    selected,
   735→    highlightedMuscles,
   736→    secondaryHighlightedMuscles,
   737→    hovered,
   738→    activeTip,
   739→    prefersReducedMotion,
   740→    isInView,
   741→    toggle,
   742→  ]);
   743→
   744→  return (
   745→    <div ref={mapRef} className="relative w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto select-none">
   746→      <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
   747→        <div className="relative">
   748→          <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/20 to-primary-hover/20 border border-primary/30 flex items-center justify-center">
   749→            <Activity className="w-5 h-5 text-primary" />
   750→          </div>
   751→          <div className="absolute -top-0.5 -right-0.5 w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-primary animate-pulse-glow" />
   752→        </div>
   753→        <div>
   754→          <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-text-primary tracking-tight">Muscle Map</h2>
   755→          <p className="text-xs text-text-secondary font-medium tracking-wide uppercase">
   756→            Interactive Anatomy • {muscles.length} muscles
   757→          </p>
   758→        </div>
   759→      </div>
   760→
   761→      <div className="flex gap-2 mb-5">
   762→        {(["front", "back"] as const).map((v) => (
   763→          <button
   764→            key={v}
   765→            onClick={() => {
   766→              setView(v);
   767→              setHovered(null);
   768→              setActiveTip(null);
   769→            }}
   770→            className={`flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest transition-all duration-300 border-2 ${view === v ? "bg-primary/15 border-primary/50 text-primary shadow-glow-primary" : "bg-bg-surface border-border text-text-secondary hover:text-text-secondary hover:border-border-active"}`}
   771→          >
   772→            {v === "front" ? "Front View" : "Back View"}
   773→          </button>
   774→        ))}
   775→      </div>
   776→
   777→      <div className="relative bg-bg-surface/70 rounded-2xl border border-border/40 backdrop-blur-xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl shadow-black/30">
   778→        <div className="absolute inset-0 anatomy-grid" />
   779→        <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-primary/[0.02] via-transparent to-secondary/[0.02]" />
   780→        <div className="absolute inset-0 overflow-hidden pointer-events-none opacity-20">
   781→          {!prefersReducedMotion && isInView && (
   782→            <div className="w-full h-16 bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent via-primary/10 to-transparent anatomy-scan-line" />
   783→          )}
   784→        </div>
   785→
   786→        <div className="relative z-10 p-3 sm:p-5">
   787→          <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
   788→            <motion.div
   789→              key={view}
   790→              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: prefersReducedMotion ? 0 : view === "back" ? 30 : -30 }}
   791→              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
   792→              exit={{ opacity: 0, x: prefersReducedMotion ? 0 : view === "back" ? -30 : 30 }}
   793→              transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}
   794→            >
   795→              <svg
   796→                viewBox={vb}
   797→                fill="none"
   798→                xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
   799→                className="w-full h-auto max-h-[62vh] sm:max-h-[70vh] mx-auto"
   800→              >
   801→                <defs>
   802→                  <filter id="ng" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
   803→                    <feGaussianBlur in="SourceGraphic" stdDeviation="6" result="blur" />
   804→                    <feMerge>
   805→                      <feMergeNode in="blur" />
   806→                      <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic" />
   807→                    </feMerge>
   808→                  </filter>
   809→                </defs>
   810→                {bodyOutlineElement}
   811→                {muscleGroups}
   812→              </svg>
   813→            </motion.div>
   814→          </AnimatePresence>
   815→        </div>
   816→
   817→        <AnimatePresence>
   818→          {tip && (
   819→            <motion.div
   820→              initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 8 }}
   821→              animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
   822→              exit={{ opacity: 0, y: 8 }}
   823→              transition={{ duration: 0.15 }}
   824→              className="absolute bottom-3 left-3 right-3 sm:bottom-4 sm:left-4 sm:right-4 bg-bg-surface border border-border/50 rounded-xl p-3.5 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-2xl z-30"
   825→            >
   826→              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   827→                <div
   828→                  className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center shrink-0"
   829→                  style={{
   830→                    backgroundColor: `${tip.color}15`,
   831→                    border: `2px solid ${tip.color}40`,
   832→                    boxShadow: `0 0 16px ${tip.glow}`,
   833→                  }}
   834→                >
   835→                  <div
   836→                    className="w-4 h-4 rounded-full"
   837→                    style={{
   838→                      backgroundColor: tip.color,
   839→                      boxShadow: `0 0 10px ${tip.glow}`,
   840→                    }}
   841→                  />
   842→                </div>
   843→                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   844→                  <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-text-primary">{tip.name}</h4>
   845→                  <p className="text-xs text-text-secondary italic">{tip.sub}</p>
   846→                  <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mt-1.5">
   847→                    {tip.exercises.map((e) => (
   848→                      <span
   849→                        key={e}
   850→                        className="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-medium"
   851→                        style={{
   852→                          color: tip.color,
   853→                          backgroundColor: `${tip.color}12`,
   854→                          border: `1px solid ${tip.color}25`,
   855→                        }}
   856→                      >
   857→                        {e}
   858→                      </span>
   859→                    ))}
   860→                  </div>
   861→                </div>
   862→                <div className="flex flex-col items-end gap-2 shrink-0">
   863→                  {activeTip === tip.id && !hovered && (
   864→                    <button
   865→                      onClick={(e) => {
   866→                        e.stopPropagation();
   867→                        setActiveTip(null);
   868→                      }}
   869→                      className="text-text-secondary hover:text-text-primary p-1 bg-bg-surface-hover rounded-full"
   870→                    >
   871→                      <X className="w-3 h-3" />
   872→                    </button>
   873→                  )}
   874→                  <div
   875→                    className="text-xs font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-1"
   876→                    style={{ color: tip.color }}
   877→                  >
   878→                    {readOnly ? "" : isMuscleActive(tip.id) ? <Check className="w-4 h-4" /> : "Tap"}
   879→                  </div>
   880→                </div>
   881→              </div>
   882→            </motion.div>
   883→          )}
   884→        </AnimatePresence>
   885→
   886→        <div className="relative z-20 px-4 pb-3">
   887→          <div className="flex justify-between text-xs text-text-secondary font-medium uppercase tracking-widest">
   888→            <span>{view === "front" ? "Anterior" : "Posterior"} View</span>
   889→            <span>{selected.size} selected</span>
   890→          </div>
   891→        </div>
   892→      </div>
   893→
   894→      <div className="mt-4 flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 justify-center">{muscleButtons}</div>
   895→
   896→      {selected.size > 0 && (
   897→        <div className="mt-3 text-center">
   898→          <button
   899→            onClick={() => {
   900→              setSelected(new Set());
   901→              onMuscleSelect?.("all", []);
   902→              setActiveTip(null);
   903→            }}
   904→            className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 mx-auto px-4 py-2 rounded-xl bg-bg-elevated border border-border hover:border-border-active text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-text-secondary hover:text-text-primary transition-all active:scale-95"
   905→          >
   906→            <RotateCcw className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
   907→            Clear Selection ({selected.size})
   908→          </button>
   909→        </div>
   910→      )}
   911→    </div>
   912→  );
   913→}
   914→
   915→const AnatomyMap = React.memo(AnatomyMapComponent, (prevProps, nextProps) => {
   916→  if (prevProps.readOnly !== nextProps.readOnly) return false;
   917→
   918→  // Compare highlightedMuscles arrays
   919→  const prevHighlighted = prevProps.highlightedMuscles || [];
   920→  const nextHighlighted = nextProps.highlightedMuscles || [];
   921→  if (prevHighlighted.length !== nextHighlighted.length) return false;
   922→  for (let i = 0; i < prevHighlighted.length; i++) {
   923→    if (prevHighlighted[i] !== nextHighlighted[i]) return false;
   924→  }
   925→
   926→  // Compare secondaryHighlightedMuscles arrays
   927→  const prevSecHighlighted = prevProps.secondaryHighlightedMuscles || [];
   928→  const nextSecHighlighted = nextProps.secondaryHighlightedMuscles || [];
   929→  if (prevSecHighlighted.length !== nextSecHighlighted.length) return false;
   930→  for (let i = 0; i < prevSecHighlighted.length; i++) {
   931→    if (prevSecHighlighted[i] !== nextSecHighlighted[i]) return false;
   932→  }
   933→
   934→  // Compare heatmapIntensity object
   935→  const prevHeatmap = prevProps.heatmapIntensity || {};
   936→  const nextHeatmap = nextProps.heatmapIntensity || {};
   937→  const prevKeys = Object.keys(prevHeatmap);
   938→  const nextKeys = Object.keys(nextHeatmap);
   939→  if (prevKeys.length !== nextKeys.length) return false;
   940→  for (const key of prevKeys) {
   941→    if (prevHeatmap[key] !== nextHeatmap[key]) return false;
   942→  }
   943→
   944→  return true;
   945→});
   946→
   947→export default AnatomyMap;
   948→
